pkgmetadata.longdescription: ACP adapter for the Claude Agent SDK, forked from agentclientprotocol/claude-agent-acp to port features from the Claude Code VS Code extension to ACP clients (like Zed) for a friendlier experience. Starts with AskUserQuestion checkbox parity (multiSelect -> ACP form field type:"array" with items.anyOf, plus per-question "Other" and descriptions). Ships compiled dist/ + production node_modules (including the SDK's native Claude CLI binary), so no compilation at merge time.
